name: com.lvn.engine.spine
description: Spine skeletal animation for the Elvin narrative-game engine: kind:"spine" catalog entities render as live skeletons (runtime-loaded json/atlas/pages, MRU cache, warm builds, fade in/out, screen fit). This package is the driver behind the engine's LvnSpineBridge seam; it activates only when the official spine-unity runtime is also installed. Spine runtimes require a Spine editor license in production — the engine core stays license-free.
